rationale: The cited paper appears in a single, brief pointer in the data description: the authors note they do not analyze individual lending decisions and direct readers to Galak, Small, and Stephen (2011) for that psychological account. It is not used to build hypotheses, motivate the earned-media mechanism, define key constructs, or support the empirical modeling choices. In this citing paper, the citation functions as contextual background and a related-reading reference rather than a building block of the study's argument.
